quotes: Line height ≥150%; more for light-on-dark text.
Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.

rules.intent: Maintain strict compliance with readability standards.
rules.rule_text: Body copy must be 16px or larger (type_scale.body.size = 16px) with a line height of at least 150% (body.line_height = 150%), with increased line height suggested for light-on-dark text setups. Visual hierarchy must follow an established type scale, ensuring clear, legible typography across all layouts.

quotes: Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.
Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets ≥48px.

rules.intent: Ensure inclusive touch targets and information transmission without color dependency.
rules.rule_text: Test color contrast to ensure legibility and never rely on color alone to convey meaning. For forms, labels must remain permanently visible (no placeholder-only labels or disappearing labels), and click or tap targets must be 48px or larger (dimension.accessibility.touch_target_min = 48px).

quotes: Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop.
animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.

rules.intent: Prevent information loss on email clients lacking animated GIF support and protect motion-sensitive users.
rules.rule_text: Ensure animations are brief and have a pause option if they are persistent. Specifically in emails, animated GIFs must convey the primary key message within the very first frame to accommodate Outlook's rendering limitations, and any autoplaying motion must last no longer than 5 seconds without a static fallback option.

quotes: Media: descriptive alt text on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.

rules.intent: Compliance with federal and WCAG digital accessibility standards.
rules.rule_text: All images must include descriptive alt text. Video or audio assets must be accompanied by transcripts to adhere to WCAG standards (wcag.com).
